decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id 'route_b44-sbs' already matches the existing canonical registry record 'route_b44-sbs', which covers B44 Select Bus Service on the Nostrand/Rogers corridor with payload route_type=select_bus_service, borough=Brooklyn. The record alias 'route_b44-sbs-2010-proposed' and source '2010_05_17_brt_nostrand_cb15' already subsume this observation. Per canonicalization rules, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is 'new' — no cross-record link is required.
